div1.entryFree: Coloured, adj. having a colour: a woman c. ill, Sonn. 144, 4. such a c. periwig, Gentl. IV, 4, 196. French crown c. beard, Mids. I, 2, 98 (Qq colour). these eyes that see thee now well c. H6A IV, 2, 37. not that our heads are some brown, some black, some auburn, some bald, but that our wits are so diversely c. Cor. II, 3, 22.
